```{r}
#| include: false

source(here::here("R", "PMM_110_Comparison_of_Consensus_Langa_Weir.R"))

style_slide_gt <- function(gt_tbl) {
  gt_tbl |>
    gt::cols_width(gt::everything() ~ gt::px(135)) |>
    gt::opt_stylize(6, color = "gray") |>
    gt::tab_options(
      table.width = gt::pct(100),
      table.font.size = gt::px(22),
      column_labels.font.size = gt::px(20),
      stub.font.size = gt::px(20),
      data_row.padding = gt::px(3)
    )
}
```

## Normal, MCI, Dementia (3-way) Agreement Matrix

```{r}
#| tbl-cap: "Pairwise quadratic weighted kappa matrix using consensus-panel weights for consensus comparisons and HCAP weights otherwise"
PMM_110$tables$agreement_matrix |>
  style_slide_gt()
```

<div style="font-size: 0.66em; line-height: 1.3;">

`r PMM_110$notes$matrix_three`

</div>

---

## Dementia vs. Non-Dementia (2-way) Agreement Matrix

```{r}
#| tbl-cap: "Pairwise kappa matrix for dementia versus non-dementia using consensus-panel weights for consensus comparisons and HCAP weights otherwise"
PMM_110$tables$agreement_matrix_binary |>
  style_slide_gt()
```

<div style="font-size: 0.66em; line-height: 1.3;">

`r PMM_110$notes$matrix_binary`

</div>
